assertions.title: New listings returns stable object envelope

steps.expected: HTTP 200 with top-level object containing coins array
steps.observed: HTTP 200 OK, Content-Type: application/json, top-level object with 'coins' key containing array of 4681 items

assertions.title: New listings rows include explicit identity fields

steps.expected: Each row has explicit id, symbol, name fields
steps.observed: All rows contain id, symbol, name fields with string values

assertions.title: New listings rows include explicit listing timestamp

steps.action: Inspect coins[] entries for timestamp field
steps.expected: Each row includes explicit listing-time field used for recency ordering
steps.observed: Each row contains 'activated_at' field with Unix timestamp integer

steps.action: Compare activated_at timestamps from first 3 rows and last rows
steps.expected: Rows ordered by recency descending (newest first)
steps.observed: First row: 1774369758 > Second row: 1774276715 > Last rows: 1773964800 - descending order confirmed

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All assertions for /coins/list/new endpoint verified: stable object envelope with coins array (VAL-CORE-013), explicit identity fields id/symbol/name on each row (VAL-CORE-013A), explicit listing timestamp 'activated_at' field (VAL-CORE-014), and newest-first descending order by activated_at (VAL-CORE-015).
